::: {.rights-block}
**Rights & provenance**

- Sullivan/Laurent letters: author holds rights. Randolph reply (7 Jan 1993): © Judson Randolph estate; reproduced in full under fair use (17 U.S.C. §107), with home address and telephone redacted. Surgical figures (Randolph journal articles) not reproduced — publisher copyright; cited/linked only. Brief critical quotations from Randolph, Hung & Rathlev (1981) appear under fair use for commentary.
- Editorial status: Published with editorial redactions; see the [Colophon](/colophon.html).
:::
